flags.message: This cell is a Rule 20 petition for a writ of mandamus (docket text: 'Petition for a writ of mandamus filed'), not a cert petition. The disposition vocabulary still fits (predicting denied), but cert base-rate anchors (statpack cert tables, salience bands) do not apply to extraordinary writs, whose modern grant rate is effectively zero. Consider a writ-type marker on petition events so evaluators score these cells against the right population.

The corpus query sidecar (127.0.0.1:8377) was unreachable this run (fedcourts query timed out), so no ranked corpus priors were retrieved. The cell degraded gracefully to the committed statpack plus CourtListener MCP retrieval, per the contract.
